SCENE 001 — EXT IRON FRONT GATES. VICTORIAN MANSION THROUGH MORNING MIST
001_E01 ESTABLISHING 10s —
⬇ Drop Higgsfield output here
ACTION EXT iron front gates. Victorian mansion through morning mist. One upper window glows.
BEAT The house watches. Morning fog. Crumbling grandeur.
TONEdust-filtered morning light, faded grandeur, professional tension
SCORElow sustained string tension, minor key, slow tempo — professional coldness meeting unresolved grief. Rising dread under the surface. No resolution.
▶ VIDEO / MOTION PROMPT
EXT. HARGROVE ESTATE — morning mist clings to the iron gates. The Victorian mansion looms through overgrown ivy. One upstairs window glows faintly — someone is already inside.

ACTION Thomas trails his hand along the banister, eyes downcast
DIALOGUE
THOMAS BLACKWOOD "She would have hated this. Strangers pawing through her things."

003_M01 MEDIUM 10s ELEANOR VOSS, RAYMOND CROSS
⬇ Drop Higgsfield output here
ACTION Eleanor moves through room with clipboard, numbering items with stickers
DIALOGUE
RAYMOND CROSS "thousand. You do know that. I'm aware of every valuation in this estate, Mr. Cross."
BEAT Raymond steps closer, arms folded, blocking the doorway
TONEintimidation, power play
STAGING0-5s: She pushes open the door and enters, taking in the space. 5-10s: She walks forward, eyes scanning the room. 10-15s: She pauses, setting down her bag, surveying what's ahead. Speaking: "thousand. You do know that. I'm aware of every valuation in this estate, Mr. Cross." Atmosphere: tensio
WARDROBEtailored charcoal blazer over black turtleneck, dark trousers, leather briefcase
SCOREstaccato low brass, compressed harmonic tension — intimidation rhythm. No melody. Threat made visible in tempo. Cut short.
▶ VIDEO / MOTION PROMPT
ELEANOR VOSS: woman, 34, sharp features, auburn hair pulled back severely, tailored charcoal blazer over black turtleneck. RAYMOND CROSS: man, 45, stocky build, thinning dark hair, sharp suspicious eyes, expensive overcoat over silk shirt. Eleanor moves through room with clipboard, numbering items with stickers [CAMERA: 35mm, f/4] [PALETTE: desaturated period tones, muted earth colours, practical lighting] [PHYSICS: practical lighting, natural textures, atmospheric depth] [AESTHETIC: period realism, no digital processing, tactile surfaces] 💬 RAYMOND CROSS: "thousand. ACTION Nadia picks up face-down photo from nightstand, studies it, takes a photo of it
BEAT Nadia picks up face-down photo from nightstand, studies it, takes a photo of it
TONEdiscovery, bittersweet past

WARDROBEjeans, vintage band t-shirt (Iron Maiden), open flannel shirt, camera around neck

012_M01 MEDIUM 10s ELEANOR VOSS, NADIA COLE
⬇ Drop Higgsfield output here
ACTION Eleanor stands at console table, phone to ear, briefcase packed
DIALOGUE
ELEANOR VOSS "The coroner's office will need the journal by morning. I'm having it couriered tonight with full chain"
BEAT Eleanor stands at console table, phone to ear, briefcase packed
TONEprofessional determination, twilight light
